reference: Hi there, my husband just stepped out onto our patio and he stepped on something. He is not sure what it was, and all of a sudden, he feels a stinging and tingling sensation from his toes to his foot. I must add that he is also under a lot of stress, and at the same time, he is making work phone calls. Is it related, or did he get bitten?
text: Hi there, my husband just stepped out onto our patio and he stepped on something. He is not sure what it was, and all of a sudden, he feels a stinging and tingling sensation from his toes to his foot. I must add that he is also under a lot of stress, and at the same time, he is making work phone calls. Is it related, or did he get bitten?
